hypothesis.mechanism: This branch requires solving a two-component structure within budget: an UPSTREAM chain of sequential single-byte equality gates whose CMP operands the value-profile CMP_MAP can bucket by closeness (so a VP fuzzer retains seeds that match a longer prefix and climbs gate-by-gate), followed by a TERMINAL contiguous multi-byte literal that I2SRandReplace can substitute from intercepted CMP operands. value_profile and value_profile_cmplog share the named axis (value_profile / CMP_MAP gradient), which is what lets them navigate the deepening upstream chain; cmplog lacks the gradient and must blindly reproduce the whole chain head, whose success probability collapses as CHAIN_DEPTH grows, so it stalls before ever reaching the terminal gate. The full synergy story (observed in the source branches as vpc beating BOTH single-technique fuzzers) is that the terminal literal also needs I2S — value_profile alone climbs the chain but cannot synthesize the wide literal — so only value_profile_cmplog clears both stages; that cross-axis half is recorded in tradeoff_observation and warrants its own I2S-axis template.
hypothesis.program_feature_parameter: CHAIN_DEPTH (compile-time -D) — the number of sequential upstream single-byte equality gates that gate entry to the terminal literal; the terminal literal width TERM_BYTES is held fixed and wide.
hypothesis.predicted_direction: has_axis fuzzers outperform the lacks_axis fuzzer; the value_profile_cmplog-over-cmplog ratio grows with CHAIN_DEPTH

predicted_endpoints.CHAIN_DEPTH=1: Shallow 1-byte chain; the terminal I2S literal dominates, so value_profile_cmplog crashes fastest and cmplog still crashes (it has I2S for the literal and can brute the 1-byte chain); value_profile lags on the terminal literal. has_axis vs lacks_axis gap is small here because the chain is trivial.
predicted_endpoints.CHAIN_DEPTH=8: 8-byte blind chain; cmplog (lacks_axis) cannot reproduce the chain head and stalls -> ~0 crashes; value_profile_cmplog (has_axis) climbs the chain via the CMP_MAP gradient and plants the terminal literal via I2S -> still > 0. value_profile climbs the chain but stalls on the terminal literal.

expected_curve_per_fuzzer.cmplog: monotone-decreasing in CHAIN_DEPTH (crashes readily at depth 1, collapses to ~0 by depth 8 as the blind chain widens)
expected_curve_per_fuzzer.value_profile: decreasing but gradient-buffered through the chain; limited throughout because it lacks I2S for the terminal literal
expected_curve_per_fuzzer.value_profile_cmplog: flat-high to gently-decreasing (resolves at every dose; climbs the chain via gradient and plants the terminal literal via I2S, so it stays > 0 across the whole sweep)

hypothesis.tradeoff_observation: This is a SYNERGY (two-component) template: the resolving fuzzer needs BOTH the value_profile CMP_MAP gradient (to navigate the deepening upstream chain) AND I2S literal substitution (to plant the terminal multi-byte literal). The named axis here is value_profile (the component that separates value_profile_cmplog from the cmplog loser as CHAIN_DEPTH grows); the I2S axis is the orthogonal component that separates value_profile_cmplog from the value_profile loser at the terminal literal. The brief's source branches show value_profile_cmplog beating BOTH single-technique fuzzers — neither alone suffices. The cross-axis I2S half (value_profile_cmplog > value_profile) is observational here and warrants its own I2S-axis template; in this harness it manifests as value_profile staying below value_profile_cmplog at all depths because value_profile cannot synthesize the fixed-width terminal literal.

verification.dockerfile: one per scan value, see deployed_targets
notes: Synergy template: the trap needs both the upstream VP-climbable chain (knob: CHAIN_DEPTH) and the fixed-width terminal I2S literal (TERM_BYTES). The named axis is value_profile; the I2S terminal-gate half is held fixed so the swept axis is purely the gradient-navigable chain depth.

TERM_BYTES is a fixed (non-swept) structural constant, not the knob; it is held wide enough that value_profile alone stalls on the terminal literal at every CHAIN_DEPTH, isolating the value_profile-axis advantage of value_profile_cmplog over cmplog as the swept effect.
